footer.attribution: Steppe is a member-governed Oregon public benefit nonprofit. No owner. It can't be sold, and the mission is written into the articles. hello@steppe.community

landing.heroTitle: A place that belongs to the people in it.
landing.heroLead: Steppe is civic infrastructure for the people of Central Oregon, owned by the members who use it. It carries no ads and no tracking, and no investor can ever buy it out. What you share here stays yours.
landing.bsStand: Steppe is civic infrastructure for Central Oregon, owned by the members who use it. Member dues pay for it, so it works for members instead of advertisers.
landing.bsBrief: One member, one vote. Verified neighbors only. No ads, and no owner who can sell it. Dues are $4 a month, the same for everyone.
landing.bsCredit2: Local art rotates through here soon
landing.bsArt1B: Member dues pay for Steppe, so it works for members instead of advertisers. The articles forbid changing that.
landing.bsArt2B: Joining means proving you live here. After that, the proof is deleted — local membership without tracking.
landing.bsArt3B: One member, one vote. Members set the budget, elect the board, and can recall it. No founder gets the last word.
landing.bsArt4B: Take everything you've added and leave whenever you want. Never sold; can't be bought by anyone who would.
landing.bsExchSub: Posted by verified neighbors · newest first · nothing sorted for clicks
landing.bsCtaP: Steppe works once enough neighbors join to run it. Add your name to the record.
landing.promiseTitle: Written down, and hard to undo.
landing.promiseDek: Four commitments, written into the founding documents. They can only change if members vote to change them.
landing.clauseAB: No ads, now or later. Nobody pays to put a message in front of you, and nothing about you is sold to anyone, ever.
landing.clauseBB: We confirm you live in Central Oregon, then instantly delete what you sent. We will never keep a file on you.
landing.clauseCB: Members decide the rules and the budget together, by secret ballot. Your vote counts exactly as much as anyone else's.
landing.clauseDB: Export everything and take it with you whenever you want. Nothing here is built to keep you from leaving.
landing.joinDek: Four steps, start to finish. No anonymous handles and no bots. Everyone here is a real neighbor.
landing.step1B: Confirm you live in the Central Oregon. We check once, then instantly delete what you sent. Real neighbors only.
landing.step2B: That's the whole membership. Pay once a year or by bank transfer. And if money's tight right now, the hardship waiver is yours, no questions asked.
landing.step3B: Join groups, post to the local exchange, ask for a hand and lend one, and get to know the people who actually live around you.
landing.step4B: Help decide the budget, the rules, and where Steppe goes next. Your ballot is secret, and it counts the same as anyone's.
landing.exchDek: Someone needs a hand. Someone has tomatoes to give away. Someone's calling a meeting. It all lands in one plain feed, newest first within your chosen categories, with no algorithm.
landing.rowOfferDesc: Grew too many Early Girls this spring. Free to anyone who'll plant them. Pickup near downtown.
landing.rowNeedDesc: Panel upgrade on a 1970s house. Looking for someone licensed and insured who's worked on older Redmond homes.
landing.rowGatherDesc: Monthly open meeting: Community Fund proposals, governance Q&A, new-member welcome.
landing.rowAidDesc: Can offer two rides a week for neighbors needing transportation to Bend. Flexible on timing.
landing.govTitle: Built so it can't be sold out from under you.
landing.govBody: Steppe is an Oregon public benefit nonprofit. There's no owner, no investors, and nothing for anyone to buy. The members run it, and the promises on this page are written into its founding documents. Only the members can change them.
landing.bedrockBody: Join your neighbors in a place that belongs to all of you.

partners.heroTitle: Civic infrastructure, built so it can't be sold.
partners.heroLead: Steppe is a member-governed public benefit nonprofit building community-owned digital infrastructure for Central Oregon. It carries no advertising, confirms that members are local, and is structurally protected from acquisition and enshittification.
partners.theoryTitle: Community life moved onto platforms that can be sold.
partners.theoryLead: The places neighbors gather online are owned by companies that monetize attention and can be acquired, shut down, or quietly degraded whenever it suits the owner. Steppe is built so none of that can happen here.
partners.s1B: Local connection now runs through extractive, ad-driven platforms with no accountability to the people who use them. They sell attention, harvest data, and can be sold out from under a community overnight.
partners.s2B: A member-owned commons: a public benefit nonprofit with no owner and nothing to sell, governed by its residents, with its core promises written into the founding documents where only members can change them.
partners.s3B: Durable local civic infrastructure that belongs to the community itself. Always ad-free, privacy-respecting, and impossible to acquire or enshittify. All towns can adopt the same model and govern it themselves.
partners.guarTitle: Written into the legal form, where goodwill can't undo them.
partners.p1a: Oregon public benefit nonprofit — no shareholders, no investors, no exit.
partners.p1b: Mission & dissolution clause written into the articles of incorporation.
partners.p1c: Acquisition is structurally impossible — there is no equity to buy.
partners.p3c: To amend a foundational rule, with 30-day notice
partners.p4h: Money flows back to the commons.
partners.p4a: Any surplus goes to a Community Fund, not to an owner.
partners.p4b: Members allocate it yearly by ranked-choice vote.
partners.fundTitle: Five streams, no single point of capture.
partners.fundLead: Steppe is funded so that no single source can dictate its direction. Member dues are the anchor, and no one funder is allowed past a hard ceiling.
partners.duesDesc: $4 a month, flat, from verified residents. The base that keeps Steppe accountable to members first.
partners.grantsDesc: Project funding for connectivity and digital-equity work, aligned to mission and time-bound.
partners.donDesc: Voluntary contributions above base dues, from members and local supporters.
partners.earnedDesc: Mission-aligned services, like helping other communities stand up their own instances.
partners.govDesc: Public funds taken last and only with radical transparency, to protect independence.
partners.ask1B: Introductions, governance expertise, and connections to people who'll help steer a member-led organization.
partners.ask2B: Project funding for rural connectivity and digital-equity programs across Central Oregon.
partners.ask3B: Broadband-equity, education, and economic-development organizations building local digital capacity.
partners.ask4B: Towns that want civic infrastructure of their own and intend to govern it themselves.

join.heroLead: Membership makes you a part-owner and a voter in a place that belongs to the people who use it, and to no one else.
join.priceNote: One tier, the same for everyone. A hardship waiver if you need it. Cancel whenever you like.
join.membTitle: One price, the same for everyone.
join.term1B: Billed once a year or by bank transfer. Everyone pays the same, with no tiers and nothing to upsell.
join.term2B: Can't swing it right now? Membership is free, no questions asked. What you can pay never decides whether you belong.
join.term3B: An optional bit above dues helps cover waivers and the Community Fund. Always your choice, never expected.
join.incl3s: — vote on the rules, budget, and direction
join.incl4s: — private by default, exportable any time
join.howDek: Four steps, start to finish. No anonymous handles and no bots. Everyone here is a real neighbor.
join.step1B: Confirm you live in the Central Oregon area. We check once, then delete what you sent. Real neighbors only.
join.step2B: That's the whole membership. Pay once a year or by bank transfer or take the hardship waiver. It's yours, no questions asked.
join.step3B: Post to the exchange, join groups, ask for a hand and lend one, and get to know the people who live around you.
join.step4B: Help decide the budget, the rules, and where Steppe goes next. Your ballot is secret, and it counts the same as anyone's.
join.fsub: We're getting Steppe ready to open in Redmond. Leave your email and we'll tell you the moment it does. And don't worry, we will scale to all of Central Oregon.
join.formnote: We'll only use your email to let you know when Steppe opens, and for nothing else. Our <link>privacy commitments</link> spell out the rest.
join.successP: We'll email you the moment membership opens in Redmond. We're glad you're here.
join.dupP: We already have your email, so we'll reach out the moment membership opens in Redmond.
join.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
join.errNetwork: Couldn't reach the server. Please try again.

privacy.heroTitle: We have nothing to gain from your data.
privacy.heroLead: Most platforms bury privacy in a menu you have to go find. Here it's part of what Steppe is: a member-owned nonprofit that runs no ads, keeps no trackers, and has nothing to gain from your information.
privacy.cAH: We never sell or share your data
privacy.cAB: There's no one to sell it to, and no business here that wants it. Steppe runs on member dues, full stop.
privacy.cBB: No third-party trackers, no advertising pixels, and no behavioral profiles. Nothing watches what you do in order to sell you something or to someone later.
privacy.cCH: We verify residency, then forget it
privacy.cCB: We confirm you live in the area, then delete the documents you used to prove it. We don't keep a file on you.
privacy.cDH: Your profile is private by default
privacy.cDB: Every field starts hidden. You choose, one at a time, whether it's visible to no one or to members.
privacy.cEB: Conversations between neighbors stay between neighbors. We don't read them. They're yours.
privacy.cFB: Export all of your data any time, and delete your account whenever you want. When you go, we delete our copy.
privacy.recordDek: Only what we need to run a verified, member-owned community. Nothing is kept “just in case.”
privacy.r1Cw: Your email and username, so you can sign in and neighbors can reach you.
privacy.r2Cw: Handled by our payment processor. We see that you've paid, and we never store your card.
privacy.r3Cw: Proof that you live in the area, reviewed to confirm eligibility, then removed.
privacy.r4Cw: Listings, messages, group activity, and the votes you cast. You create it, and you can remove it.
privacy.r5Cw: Basic technical records to keep the service running and safe. No tracking profiles.
privacy.rSeeD: View everything we hold about you.
privacy.rExportD: Download your data and take it with you.
privacy.rCorrectD: Fix anything that's wrong, any time.
privacy.rDeleteD: Close your account and we erase our copy.
privacy.closeP: This plain-language page is the one we actually live by. There's a full legal policy with the formal detail if you want it, and we're always glad to answer questions.
privacy.legalGoverns: The full legal policy is available in English, and the English version governs.

contact.heroLead: A question, a partnership idea, or just want to know more about Steppe? Send a note and we'll get back to you.
contact.resp: We usually reply within a few days.
contact.formH: Tell us what's on your mind.
contact.fsub: Fill in a few details and we'll reply to the email you give us.
contact.mailtoSub: Send us an email and we'll reply to the address you write from as soon as we can.
contact.phMessage: What would you like to tell us?
contact.formnote: We'll only use your message to reply, and for nothing else. See our <link>privacy commitments</link>.
contact.successP: Thanks for reaching out. We'll reply to the email you gave us as soon as we can.

preview.heroBadge: A preview, not the finished product
preview.heroLead: This is the first version. A place to trade help with neighbors, groups you choose to join, a secret vote on how things run, and a profile that stays private until you say so.
preview.heroNote: Everything here is the shape of the first version. Where it goes next is up to the members, by vote.
preview.threadNote: Messages stay inside Steppe. Your email and phone are never shared.
preview.titlePh: What are you offering or asking for?
preview.descriptionPh: Add the details a neighbor would want to know.
preview.groupsSub: Join what you like. You can leave any time.
preview.votedP: No one can see how you voted. At launch every member's vote counts the same; members can later vote to weight by tenure.
preview.capExchangeP: Needs, offers, jobs, goods, mutual aid, and events, all on one listing. Nothing is ranked or boosted. Tap any entry to open it and reach that neighbor directly.
preview.capExchangeM: No ads · no tracking · messages stay inside Steppe
preview.capGroupsP: Join the neighborhood and interest groups you want and leave any of them whenever you like. Open a group to see its feed and upcoming events.
preview.capGroupsM: You control which groups can message you
preview.capGovernP: Vote on the budget, the rules, and where Steppe goes next. Your ballot is secret, and at launch everyone's counts the same.
preview.capGovernM: 15% quorum · secret ballot · reversible by vote
preview.capYouP: Your profile starts private. Keep each field hidden, or show it to members. It's field by field, and it's your call. We will never take that from you.
preview.capYouM: Username always shown · everything else your choice
